TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Conv-talking_tamih_panay

S.FORM: mi nukay a maemin kiya wawa isu.
S.TRANSL: 妳的小孩都回來了嗎？
Did all your children come home?

S.FORM: awaay minukay u mikadafuay tu cangra ira kuni minukay itira i timul.
S.TRANSL: 沒有回來，她們都嫁了，回到南邊（男方）的家。
(No,) they didn’t. They are all married and returned to the hometown of their spouse in the south.

S.FORM: itira i pikadafuan nira a ca’ay pinukay tayni i luma’ ira inacila milisu’ patiku tu tayra.
S.TRANSL: 回到夫婿的家。T: 啊，沒回到家來嗎？P: 昨天有回來拜訪之後就回去了。
To the home of their spouse. T: Oh, didn’t (they) come home? P: Yesterday, they visited, (but) left (right away).

S.FORM: en latek anudafak dadaya ira tu cangra tayni ah maherek tu kamu tayra i tadem.
S.TRANSL: P: 可能明天晚上又回來了。 T: 妳們掃墓結束了嗎？
P: They would probably come (again) tomorrow night. T: Oh, have you finished (cleaning up your ancestors’) tombs?

S.FORM: cah ca ho ca ho misanga matayal anini tunu tadem kami icila misanga tu miliyaw tu tadem niya wina tiya mama.
S.TRANSL: 還沒，我們現在還在整理墳墓。幾天前我們整理、翻修媽媽爸爸的墳墓。
Not yet, we’re still cleaning. A few days ago we cleaned Mother’s and Father’s tombs.

S.FORM: a mapela’ kiya sulafu nira haw cinanum ku laluma.
S.TRANSL: 鋼筋水泥裂了，水滲進裡面了。
The cement cracked and so water leaked inside.

S.FORM: hai mahaen mapela’ kiya niyam.
S.TRANSL: 是的，一樣，我們的也裂了。
Right, ours also cracked.

S.FORM: miliyaw kami icila sa.
S.TRANSL: 我們前幾天翻修。
We have started to work a few days ago.

S.FORM: misanga’an milepun tu anini haw han pipaherek han mipacuk tu fafuy.
S.TRANSL: 今天要完工了。工作完成，趁這個機會（子女都回來），我們今天要殺豬。
We should be able to finish today. Once we are done, we will kill a pig (today).

S.FORM: ho fangcal kira.
S.TRANSL: 哦，很好阿。
Good!

S.FORM: hay.
S.TRANSL: 是的。
Right!

S.FORM: ya maherek tu i dafak ca ho.
S.TRANSL: 早上做好了嗎，還沒好嗎？
Have you finished this morning?

S.FORM: mamalepun anini sa’an.
S.TRANSL: 今天說是會完成。
We would finish today.

S.FORM: sa mipacuk anini mipacuk tu i dafak ya fafuy.
S.TRANSL: 所以今天要殺豬，早上就殺了。
We already killed a pig this morning.

S.FORM: a a fangcal kira.
S.TRANSL: 喔，那很好阿。
That’s good.

S.FORM: ya ci aciang a ci namuh kura citudungay mi‘aca tuya fafuy.
S.TRANSL: Aciang跟Namuh負責買那頭豬。
Aciang and Namuh bought the pig.

S.FORM: sa ati’han ni ofad malahok cangra itira malahok.
S.TRANSL: 所以Ofad叫他們吃午餐，就在那邊吃了。
Ofad invited them (for lunch) there.

S.FORM: i honi hai.
S.TRANSL: T: 剛才嗎？ P: 是阿。
T: Just now? P: Right!

S.FORM: ha a tayra ho malafi anuhoni.
S.TRANSL: 等一下還要去哪裡吃晚餐？
So (you’re) going there for dinner later?

S.FORM: nawhani.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼呢？
Why?

S.FORM: awa ku limaw nuya a wawa .
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩沒有時間回來。
The children don’t have time to come home.

S.FORM: a i honi a minukay ca nufu na i pusung.
S.TRANSL: Nufu一家人剛剛從台東回來。
Nufu (and his family) just came from Taitung.

S.FORM: ca ca hekaw i awa minukay.
S.TRANSL: Hekaw一家人沒有回來嗎？
Didn’t Hekaw come home?

S.FORM: a ca’ay pinukay cingra awa ku limaw.
S.TRANSL: 他沒回來，沒有時間。
(They) didn’t come home; they didn’t have time.

S.FORM: m ca’ay karolay kisu tu kapihiya.
S.TRANSL: 做這一件事你不會累嗎？
Aren’t you tired doing this?

S.FORM: hai maulah kaku mi tengil.
S.TRANSL: 不會，我喜歡聽。
No, I like to listen.

S.FORM: hai i fangcal.
S.TRANSL: 那很好。
That’s good.

S.FORM: edeng nika mafukil tu nu holam a misaheci.
S.TRANSL: 只是，不會用漢語解釋。
But I can’t explain in Chinese.

S.FORM: anu ira kura kafukilan hang ca maten u kira maten matenes mi saliyaliyaw sumuwal hai.
S.TRANSL: 如果有不會的地方，持續反反覆覆的說，是不是？
If there is something I don’t know, lots of repetitions, right?

S.FORM: hai kaku ma mahaen.
S.TRANSL: 我也是。
Me too.

S.FORM: kaku mafana’ kaku tu nu kaping haw matini matini sa’an cangra haw.
S.TRANSL: 我雖然會說國語，他們說「這樣子、這樣子」。
Although I know Mandarin, (they) would say, ’Like this? Like this?’.

S.FORM: ira kura kafana’an aku haw.
S.TRANSL: 有我所知道的。
There are some (answers) that I know.

S.FORM: roma anu mafukil kaku misaharaterateng haw ca’ay kangaay matini sa cangra haw.
S.TRANSL: 其次，如果有我不知道，正在思索的時候，他們說「不可以這樣子嗎？」
If I don’t know and when I am thinking, they would say, ‘Can’t we say this?’

S.FORM: matama itu.
S.TRANSL: 結果，答案對了（找到答案了）。
And (they) had the answer.

S.FORM: cangra ku patalahekaray sa haw.
S.TRANSL: 結果（將其中涵義）表達出來的人也是他們自己。
They found an answer by themselves.

S.FORM: a hai matira kura matama han.
S.TRANSL: （我就會說）「是的，就是這樣，如此如此。」
I wouls day, ‘Right, like that’.

S.FORM: ira ku maha’enay nu maku cangranan.
S.TRANSL: 我也有同樣的情形在他們身上。
I have the same experience.

S.FORM: a fangcal kira hai nika u nuninian kahmaw ku nuninian.
S.TRANSL: T: 很好啊。 P: 是，不過這次（問題）比較簡單。
T: That’s good! P: Yes, but it's easier this time.

S.FORM: ca’ay kamatira tu nuriraw tusa tu kala kala sa satapangan aku ka’emed kununinian a misanga’an.
S.TRANSL: 不像那二個人，我剛開始的時候，做這個（採集）很容易。
Not like the two, when I just started, this (collecting data) is easy.

S.FORM: anu ca ca ka tama haw anu hacuwa kura kafana’an mi hai hai anu ma pasadak han hai.
S.TRANSL: 雖然答非所問，如果你了解多少，就表達出來。
Even though (you) cannot find an answer, regardless of how much you know,(you) can express it.

S.FORM: matatudung aca tu hati mahaen aku.
S.TRANSL: 如果意思很接近，剛剛好的，我也是這樣子做。
If the meaning is close, I did so too.

S.FORM: matatudung itu haw hatiraen aca aku ca’ay tu kafilu kura hiya misama’ama’an kira.
S.TRANSL: （表達內涵）很接近了的時候，我是這樣子做，其他的方式也無法勝任了。
If the expression is close, I do it like this, but I’m not able to help with the others.

S.FORM: u roma anu mi falicen ta misanuamis haw anu patatama anuhan ita tura suwal nu holam u roma i ku’esit a tengilen.
S.TRANSL: 其次，如果我們翻譯成阿美語，如果我們硬要符合漢語的話，聽起來硬梆梆的。
Then, if we translate it into Amis, if we have to (conform to) Chinese, (the expression would) sound awkward.

S.FORM: mhm hai hai.
S.TRANSL: 對。
Yes.

S.FORM: ta u roma haw i unu mita i a pafesot sa ku mita suwal kira.
S.TRANSL: 我們的話很直接。
Our style of expression is more direct.

S.FORM: hai.
S.TRANSL: 沒錯
Yes.

S.FORM: saka anu icuwaay kura ka’emeday i sa’an hai ma matira tu hatira a hatira aca kura pi hiya.
S.TRANSL: 如果哪個地方比較簡單的，僅僅如此作採集工作。
If there is an easier part, it’s just like this.

S.FORM: ura patusukan nangra a minanam tunini i.
S.TRANSL: 那個他們專程來這裡學習。
They come here to learn.

S.FORM: u sakafana’aw nangra tu sanuamisaw anu ca i u pikingkiw nira.
S.TRANSL: 他們想要學會說阿美語，如果不是的話，他們是來研究的。
They want to learn Amis; otherwise, they want to do research.

S.FORM: kingkiw nira a u pikingkiw nira hay sa kaku kira.
S.TRANSL: P: 他們做研究。 T: 我認為是如此。
P: They do research. T: I think so.

S.FORM: hai u pikingkiw nira mi sulinga’han a mitengil tu hay.
S.TRANSL: P: 是的，(目的)是研究。 T: 詳細的聽了。 P: 是的。
P: Right, for research. T: (They) really listen to (you). P: Right.

S.FORM: ira ku naw ira ku.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼有a？
Why is there an ‘a’?

S.FORM: i sa’an hai naw i ira ku.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼有i？
Why is there an ‘i’?

S.FORM: hai kin naw ira ku hai mikingkiway cangra.
S.TRANSL: 他們是來研究的。
They (want to) do research.

S.FORM: hai hai anu minanamay i ku misaliyaliyaw a sumuwal hai hai mikinkiway cingra sa.
S.TRANSL: T: 是的，假如是來學習，應該不斷反覆的說。 P: 是，他是來研究的。
T: Right, if they want to learn, they have to practice many times. P: Yes, they (are here to) do research.

S.FORM: anu ira ku anu ira ku ka anu ku i ka‘ayaw i kaikur masa masasifelih itu uhuh ca’ay katatama haw.
S.TRANSL: 如果有i，如果有ka，如果ku在前，在後，前後顛倒，就不順了。
If there is an ‘i’, if there is a ‘ka’, if the order of ‘ku’ is reversed, it does not sound correct.

S.FORM: ca’ay kanga’ay han kira.
S.TRANSL: 這樣不可以。
It’s not good.

S.FORM: ca’ay katatudung.
S.TRANSL: 這樣不適合。
It’s not good.
